_doc: RRDSD Round 1 — Regret-Routed Dual-Surface Distillation per Codex T+L KM-R2. Single-anchor lite variant (multi-teacher deferred). Warm-start from iter5 best.pt. Output-surface only; CKA structural deferred if beta_eff stays 0 in R1-lite.

_notes.mechanism: RRDSD-lite: single-anchor SmolLM2 with A*sqrt(D) utility, q45-q98 ZPD, cumulative 65% mass density gating clamped [10%,20%], forward-KL at T_loss=0.7 (with teacher sharpening), no T^2 scaling. Patch-CKA structural surface deferred — would need kd_beta > 0 and repr_proj integration.
changes_from_zar_gjsd_r1: Density control: top-15% -> cumulative 65% utility mass, clamped [10%,20%]
Loss: gJSD(0.7,0.3) with T^2 -> forward-KL at T_loss=0.7, no T^2
Teacher sharpening: p_t^(1/T_loss) explicit, not just kd_temperature baked in
Schedule: 2500 -> 1800 steps, earlier decay start (step 700 vs 1200)
Kill rules tighter: step 100 > 1.425, step 300 > 1.402, step 800 > 1.392, step 1400 > 1.386
skipped_from_full_rrdsd: Multi-teacher competitive routing (requires per-teacher tensor collection, deferred to R2)
Patch-CKA structural loss (requires kd_beta > 0 + repr_proj wiring, deferred to R2 if output-only survives)
